mapper.sql: instance_base as ( select ji.tenant_id, ji.id, ji.job_code, ji.worker_group, ji.related_file_id, ji.instance_status, greatest( extract(epoch from ( coalesce(ji.finished_at, ji.updated_at, ji.created_at) - coalesce(ji.started_at, ji.created_at) )) * 1000, 0 )::bigint as duration_ms from batch.job_instance ji where ji.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and coalesce(ji.finished_at, ji.updated_at, ji.created_at) >= #{from} and coalesce(ji.finished_at, ji.updated_at, ji.created_at) < #{to} ), file_by_instance as ( select f.job_instance_id, count(distinct f.file_id)::bigint as file_count, coalesce(sum(f.file_size_bytes), 0)::bigint as total_file_bytes from ( select distinct i.id as job_instance_id, fr.id as file_id, fr.file_size_bytes from instance_base i join batch.file_record fr on fr.tenant_id = i.tenant_id and fr.id = i.related_file_id union select distinct pi.related_job_instance_id as job_instance_id, fr.id as file_id, fr.file_size_bytes from instance_base i join batch.pipeline_instance pi on pi.tenant_id = i.tenant_id and pi.related_job_instance_id = i.id join batch.file_record fr on fr.tenant_id = pi.tenant_id and fr.id = pi.file_id where pi.related_job_instance_id is not null ) f group by f.job_instance_id ), progress_by_instance as ( select pi.related_job_instance_id as job_instance_id, coalesce(sum(pp.processed_count), 0)::bigint as processed_records from instance_base i join batch.pipeline_instance pi on pi.tenant_id = i.tenant_id and pi.related_job_instance_id = i.id join batch.pipeline_progress pp on pp.tenant_id = pi.tenant_id and pp.pipeline_instance_id = pi.id where pi.related_job_instance_id is not null group by pi.related_job_instance_id ), instance_enriched as ( select i.*, coalesce(f.total_file_bytes, 0)::bigint as total_file_bytes, coalesce(p.processed_records, 0)::bigint as processed_records from instance_base i left join file_by_instance f on f.job_instance_id = i.id left join progress_by_instance p on p.job_instance_id = i.id )
mapper.select: with select tenant_id, null::varchar as job_code, null::varchar as worker_code, null::varchar as worker_group, count(1)::bigint as instance_count, 0::bigint as task_count, count(1) filter (where instance_status in ('SUCCESS', 'SUCCESS_DRY_RUN'))::bigint as success_count, count(1) filter ( where instance_status in ('FAILED', 'PARTIAL_FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'TERMINATED', 'FAILED_DRY_RUN') )::bigint as failure_count, coalesce(sum(duration_ms), 0)::bigint as total_duration_ms, coalesce(avg(duration_ms), 0)::bigint as avg_duration_ms, coalesce(percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by duration_ms), 0)::bigint as p95_duration_ms, coalesce(sum(total_file_bytes), 0)::bigint as total_file_bytes, coalesce(sum(processed_records), 0)::bigint as processed_records, 0.0::double precision as records_per_second, 0.0::double precision as mb_per_second from instance_enriched group by tenant_id order by total_duration_ms desc limit #{limit}

with select tenant_id, job_code, null::varchar as worker_code, max(worker_group)::varchar as worker_group, count(1)::bigint as instance_count, 0::bigint as task_count, count(1) filter (where instance_status in ('SUCCESS', 'SUCCESS_DRY_RUN'))::bigint as success_count, count(1) filter ( where instance_status in ('FAILED', 'PARTIAL_FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'TERMINATED', 'FAILED_DRY_RUN') )::bigint as failure_count, coalesce(sum(duration_ms), 0)::bigint as total_duration_ms, coalesce(avg(duration_ms), 0)::bigint as avg_duration_ms, coalesce(percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by duration_ms), 0)::bigint as p95_duration_ms, coalesce(sum(total_file_bytes), 0)::bigint as total_file_bytes, coalesce(sum(processed_records), 0)::bigint as processed_records, 0.0::double precision as records_per_second, 0.0::double precision as mb_per_second from instance_enriched group by tenant_id, job_code order by total_duration_ms desc, job_code asc limit #{limit}

with , task_base as ( select ji.tenant_id, ji.id as job_instance_id, ji.job_code, ji.worker_group, jt.assigned_worker_code as worker_code, jt.task_status, greatest( extract(epoch from ( coalesce(jt.finished_at, jt.updated_at, jt.created_at) - coalesce(jt.started_at, jt.created_at) )) * 1000, 0 )::bigint as duration_ms from batch.job_task jt join batch.job_instance ji on ji.tenant_id = jt.tenant_id and ji.id = jt.job_instance_id where jt.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and jt.assigned_worker_code is not null and coalesce(jt.finished_at, jt.updated_at, jt.created_at) >= #{from} and coalesce(jt.finished_at, jt.updated_at, jt.created_at) < #{to} ), worker_instance as ( select distinct tenant_id, worker_code, job_instance_id from task_base ), worker_payload as ( select wi.tenant_id, wi.worker_code, coalesce(sum(ie.total_file_bytes), 0)::bigint as total_file_bytes, coalesce(sum(ie.processed_records), 0)::bigint as processed_records from worker_instance wi join instance_enriched ie on ie.tenant_id = wi.tenant_id and ie.id = wi.job_instance_id group by wi.tenant_id, wi.worker_code ) select tb.tenant_id, null::varchar as job_code, tb.worker_code, max(tb.worker_group)::varchar as worker_group, count(distinct tb.job_instance_id)::bigint as instance_count, count(1)::bigint as task_count, count(1) filter (where tb.task_status = 'SUCCESS')::bigint as success_count, count(1) filter (where tb.task_status in ('FAILED', 'CANCELLED', 'TERMINATED'))::bigint as failure_count, coalesce(sum(tb.duration_ms), 0)::bigint as total_duration_ms, coalesce(avg(tb.duration_ms), 0)::bigint as avg_duration_ms, coalesce(percentile_cont(0.95) within group (order by tb.duration_ms), 0)::bigint as p95_duration_ms, max(coalesce(wp.total_file_bytes, 0))::bigint as total_file_bytes, max(coalesce(wp.processed_records, 0))::bigint as processed_records, 0.0::double precision as records_per_second, 0.0::double precision as mb_per_second from task_base tb left join worker_payload wp on wp.tenant_id = tb.tenant_id and wp.worker_code = tb.worker_code group by tb.tenant_id, tb.worker_code order by total_duration_ms desc, tb.worker_code asc limit #{limit}
